raw.subject: Your Greenville page caught my eye, Hentze Angus
raw.body:
Hi,

Your page really highlights your Black Angus heritage and commitment to all-natural premium beef. It's clear you're passionate about what you do, and I appreciate the effort you put into sharing your story with the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and I think that might be leaving some potential customers who prefer a more traditional online experience missing out on learning about your business.

I pulled together a quick page concept from what you already post on Facebook. The mockup includes a services overview, photo gallery, and contact section, as well as a map with your current hours.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/hentze-angus-greenville/

If you're interested in learning more about bringing your online presence up to date, I'd be happy to discuss the process and how it can help you reach more customers.

It's a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to get a quote or chat more about your options, just reply to this email or give me a quick call at your convenience.
